qa_pairs.question: Which web browsers are supported for accessing the Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: Firefox and Chrome browsers are supported.

qa_pairs.question: Are Safari and Edge browsers validated for use with the Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: Safari and Edge may work, but they have not been validated.

qa_pairs.question: What resources are pre-created for users in the New Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: Your Arbutus Cloud Project (Tenant), Network, and Router will be pre-created for you in Arbutus Cloud.

qa_pairs.question: Will users have access to the same projects on the New Arbutus Cloud as they had on the Legacy Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, you will have access to the same projects on the New Arbutus Cloud as you had on the Legacy Arbutus Cloud.

qa_pairs.question: Is the floating IP range in the New Arbutus Cloud the same as in the Legacy Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the floating IP range in the New Arbutus Cloud is different than the Legacy Arbutus Cloud.

qa_pairs.question: What might be required due to the different floating IP ranges in the New Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: New Security Groups (OpenStack’s firewall rules) may be required because the floating IP range in the New Arbutus Cloud is different from the Legacy Arbutus Cloud.
